author: codex-duplicate-audit

patch.value: Deduplicate mutation author fallback resolution across commands

Duplicate audit 2026-05-22: mutation commands locally reimplement the same author fallback logic: explicit candidate, PM_AUTHOR, settings.author_default, trimmed value, then unknown fallback. Representative copies are resolveAuthor in src/cli/commands/append.ts:23, comments.ts:38, files.ts:108 and toAuthor in delete.ts:21 and history-redact.ts:111, with the same pattern also appearing in notes/learnings/docs/test/claim/close/update/restore/plan paths. Existing searches found only broad parent/history hits and adjacent command-stack items; no active item owns the shared mutation-author contract.

One shared helper owns mutation author resolution; command modules consume it without behavior changes; PM_AUTHOR/settings.author_default/unknown fallback semantics stay covered by focused command tests; pnpm build passes.

value.author: codex-duplicate-audit
value.text: Duplicate-check evidence: pm search 'author fallback resolveAuthor mutation author PM_AUTHOR settings.author_default' and pm search 'shared author helper resolve mutation author fallback' found no active exact item; pm-9y8q is scoped to comments/notes/learnings stacks, not cross-command author fallback.

message: Create duplicate-audit finding for mutation author fallback

patch.value: Extracted resolveAuthor to src/core/shared/author.ts, eliminated 10+ duplicate copies. Merged via PR #55.
